workflow.name: Weaviate HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Weaviate HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Weaviate inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/weaviate-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[weaviate]
10.31.127.11 role=vector name=weaviate-01
10.31.127.12 role=vector name=weaviate-02
10.31.127.13 role=vector name=weaviate-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Weaviate container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/weaviate-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: weaviate
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/weaviate-inventory.ini /tmp/weaviate-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Weaviate cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/weaviate-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: weaviate
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/weaviate
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/weaviate/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            weaviate:
              image: semitechnologies/weaviate:1.26.1
              container_name: octastack-weaviate
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                QUERY_DEFAULTS_LIMIT: "25"
                AUTHENTICATION_ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_ENABLED: "true"
                PERSISTENCE_DATA_PATH: "/var/lib/weaviate"
                DEFAULT_VECTORIZER_MODULE: "none"
                CLUSTER_HOSTNAME: "node1"
              ports:
                - "8080:8080"
              volumes:
                - data:/var/lib/weaviate
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Weaviate cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/weaviate-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/weaviate/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/weaviate/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/weaviate/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/weaviate-inventory.ini /tmp/weaviate-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Weaviate topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/weaviate-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Weaviate HA topology

Members:
- weaviate-01: 10.31.127.11 (vector)
- weaviate-02: 10.31.127.12 (vector)
- weaviate-03: 10.31.127.13 (vector)

This example deploys one Weaviate container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/weaviate-topology.md

data.label: Validate Weaviate cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/weaviate-inventory.ini weaviate -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
